text: xiii) IP turbine shaft seals (complete set of interstage seals of 1 set all the stages of moving blades of IP rotor with fixing material) Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 29 xiv) IP shaft gland seals (complete set for replacement of front 1 set and rear with fixing material) xv) IP turbine first stage stationary and moving blades with 1 set assembly materials xvi) IP outer and inner casing fasteners and fixing materials 20% of each type and size xvii) IP/LP journal bearing (complete with torous, intermediate 1 set pieces sole/base plate and all other fixing/assembly materials required to complete one bearing assembly except housing) xviii) IP/LP pedestal oil guard rings (complete set of oil guard 1 set Assembly for front and rear with fixing material) xix) IP/LP shaft coupling bolts, lock-washers, nuts, pins, screws, 1 set coupling guards xx) LP turbine rear bearing (complete set of bearing assembly 1 set including torous, intermediate pieces sole/base plate and all other fixing/assembly materials required to complete one bearing assembly without housing) xxi) LP turbine atmospheric diaphragm (complete set 1 set for replacement of one diaphragm assembly) xxii) LP shaft seals (complete set of interstage seals of 1 set all the stages of LP rotor with fixing materials) xxiii) LP shaft gland seals (complete set for replacement of 1 set front and rear with fixing materials) xxiv) LP turbine rotor moving blades of last 3 stages for 1 set each path with all the fastening material required for the above xxv) LP outer and inner casing fasteners fixing materials 20% of each type and size xxvi) Turbine and generator shaft journal bearings 1 set (complete set of bearing assembly including torous, intermediate pieces sole/base plate and all other fixing/assembly materials required to complete each bearing assembly except housing) xxvii) LP turbine and generator shaft coupling bolts, nuts, 1 set lock washers, pins, screws, coupling guard. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 30 9.2.2 Emergency Stop Valves i) Set of all internals required to complete one valve assembly 1 set excluding valve body ii) Set of all internals required to complete one servomotor 1 set assembly excluding body iii) Set of all internals required to complete one test valve 1
